_comment: Importable Orcabot dashboard template for running slop-code-bench with a Claude Code orchestrator + read-only run viewers + results browser. Shape matches DashboardTemplateWithData in frontend/src/types/dashboard.ts. `content` fields are JSON strings matching each block type's content schema (terminal: TerminalContentState; browser: {url}; note: {text}). The viewer panes are NOT in the template — the orchestrator spawns them dynamically per run via the create_terminal MCP tool (see orchestrator-runbook.md).
name: SlopCodeBench Runner
description: Run slop-code-bench (or its skills variant) with a Claude Code orchestrator you drive in English. Each agent run shows up as a live, read-only viewer pane; results render in a browser block.

items.content:
{"text":"# SlopCodeBench Runner

Drive the **Benchmark Orchestrator** (Claude Code) in plain English via Remote Control:

- *"Run file_backup and execution_server with claude_code on opus-4.5"*
- *"Show me the runs"* -> it spawns a read-only viewer pane per run
- *"Stop execution_server, it's stuck"*
- *"Score the finished runs and open the dashboard"*

Keys live in the secrets broker. Full instructions: benchmarks/slopcodebench/orchestrator-runbook.md"}
